[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Sĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Metall-Schlange]][[fr:Serpent de métal]][[hak:Sîn-sṳ]][[ja:辛巳]][[ko:신사 (간지)]][[nds:Metall-Snaak]][[vi:Tân Tỵ]][[za:Sinceih]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-sū]][[zh-yue:辛巳]][[zh:辛巳]]

{{Referencesの明記| date = 2021st year 6月|qq=}}

'''Kanotomi''' (辛巳) (pronounced ka-no-to-mi, shin-kin-no-mi, or shin-shi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle]]. 

It is the 18th of the combined sets of the Ten Heavenly Stems and Twelve Earthly Branches. The one before it is [[Yang Metal Dragon]], and the one after it is [[Yang Water Horse]]. According to the [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin-yang and Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] element [[Kanoto (辛)]] is the yin aspect of metal, and the [[Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] element [[Snake (zodiac)|Snake (巳)]] is the yin aspect of fire. Under the concept of [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|Mutual Restraint]], fire subdues metal (火剋金).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Snake (辛巳)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xīnsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 si6
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: shinji
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinhsa (신사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Tân Tỵ

==Years of Yin Metal Snake==
A Gregorian calendar year that, when divided by 60, has a remainder of 21 is a Kanotomi year.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Kanotomi Years'''
|-
!1st Millennium!!2nd Millennium!!3rd Millennium
|-
|
*21
*81
*141
*201
*261
*321
*381
*441
*501
*561
*621
*681
*741
*801
*861
*921
*981
|
*1041
*1101
*1161
*1221
*1281
*1341
*1401
*1461
*1521
*1581
*1641
*1701
*1761
*1821
*1881
*1941
|
*2001
*2061
*2121
*2181
*2241
*2301
*2361
*2421
*2481
*2541
*2601
*2661
*2721
*2781
*2841
*2901
*2961
|}

==Months of Yin Metal Snake==
In the Gregorian calendar, during years ending in 0 or 5 (where the [[Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kanoe (庚)]] or [[Kinoto (乙)]]), the fourth month (April) is the Kanotomi month. Note that this can refer to the month in the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or the “solar term” month (from [[Lixia]] to the day before [[Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).

==Days of Yin Metal Snake==
A Kanotomi day is associated with the following selection day (選日).

=== Auspicious Days ===
On a Kanotomi day, it is the fourth day of [[Tsuchi (Japanese term)|Shōdo]].
== See Also ==

{{wikidata link|Q1062057}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
